element.hint: Display value labels on data points
element.label: Data Label - Show Data Labels
element.name: show_value_labels

element.hint: Custom label text displayed below the X-axis
element.label: X-Axis Label
element.name: x_axis_label

element.hint: Number format pattern for Y-axis values (e.g., ',.0f' for thousands)
element.label: Y-Axis Format
element.name: y_axis_format

element.hint: Radius of data points on the line in pixels
element.label: Point Size
element.name: point_size

element.hint: Font size for data labels in pixels
element.label: Data Label - Font Size
element.name: label_font_size

element.hint: Y-axis value where a horizontal reference line is drawn
element.label: Reference Line Value
element.name: reference_line_value

element.hint: Fill the area between the line and the X-axis
element.label: Area Fill
element.name: area_fill

element.hint: Color of the reference line (hex or CSS color)
element.label: Reference Line Color
element.name: reference_line_color

element.hint: Show circular markers at each data point on the line
element.label: Points - Show Points
element.name: show_points

element.hint: Text label displayed next to the reference line
element.label: Reference Line - Label
element.name: reference_line_label

element.hint: Opacity of the area fill (0-1, where 1 is fully opaque)
element.label: Area Opacity
element.name: area_opacity

element.hint: Custom label text displayed beside the Y-axis
element.label: Y-Axis Label
element.name: y_axis_label

element.hint: Thickness of the line stroke in pixels
element.label: Line Width (px)
element.name: line_width

element.hint: Color of the background grid lines
element.label: Grid - Grid Color
element.name: grid_color

element.hint: Show background grid lines for easier value reading
element.label: Show Grid Lines
element.name: grid_show

element.hint: Interpolation method used to draw the line between data points
element.label: Lines - Curve Type
element.name: curve_type

element.hint: Style of the fill area beneath the line
element.label: Lines - Area Fill Style
element.name: area_fill_style

element.hint: Show circular markers at each data point on the line
element.label: Show Points
element.name: point_show
